# Task 10: Vivado Tcl Generator

**Prerequisites:** Task 09 complete
**Goal:** Generate a valid Vivado non-project-mode Tcl script from an `AssembledFilesets`. This is the core output of the Vivado backend.

## Spec Reference
`system_plan.md` §15 Phase 1 Vivado Tcl Generation, §10.3.2 (Backend Plugin Interface)

## File to Implement
`crates/loom-vivado/src/tcl_gen.rs`
`crates/loom-vivado/src/lib.rs` (VivadoBackend struct)

## Target Tcl Output

The generator must produce a script matching this structure (from spec §15):

```tcl
# Auto-generated by Loom — do not edit
# Project: radar_processor
# Part: xczu7ev-ffvc1156-2-e
# Generated: 2026-03-03T14:00:00Z

# Read source files (dependency order)
read_verilog -sv {/abs/path/lib/axi_common/rtl/axi_common_pkg.sv}
read_verilog -sv {/abs/path/lib/axi_async_fifo/rtl/cdc_gray_counter.sv}
read_verilog -sv {/abs/path/lib/axi_async_fifo/rtl/axi_async_fifo.sv}
read_verilog -sv {/abs/path/projects/radar_processor/src/radar_top.sv}

# Read constraints (component-scoped first, then global)
read_xdc -ref axi_async_fifo {/abs/path/lib/axi_async_fifo/constraints/cdc_false_paths.xdc}
read_xdc {/abs/path/projects/radar_processor/constraints/timing.xdc}
read_xdc {/abs/path/projects/radar_processor/constraints/physical.xdc}

# Synthesis
synth_design -top radar_top -part xczu7ev-ffvc1156-2-e

# Implementation
opt_design
place_design
route_design

# Bitstream
write_bitstream -force {.build/radar_processor/default/radar_top.bit}
```

## Implementation

```rust
// crates/loom-vivado/src/tcl_gen.rs

use std::path::{Path, PathBuf};
use std::fmt::Write as FmtWrite;
use loom_core::assemble::fileset::{AssembledFilesets, FileLanguage, ConstraintScope};
use loom_core::resolve::resolver::ResolvedProject;
use loom_core::build::context::BuildContext;

/// Generate Vivado non-project-mode Tcl script.
pub fn generate_tcl(
    project: &ResolvedProject,
    filesets: &AssembledFilesets,
    context: &BuildContext,
) -> Result<String, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let target = project.project.target.as_ref()
        .ok_or("No [target] block in project manifest")?;

    let top_module = &project.project.project.top_module;
    let part = &target.part;

    // Bitstream output path
    let bitstream_path = context.build_dir.join(format!("{}.bit", top_module));

    let mut script = String::new();

    // Header comment
    writeln!(script, "# Auto-generated by Loom — do not edit")?;
    writeln!(script, "# Project: {}", project.project.project.name)?;
    writeln!(script, "# Part: {}", part)?;
    writeln!(script, "# Generated: {}", chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339())?;
    writeln!(script)?;

    // Read source files
    writeln!(script, "# Read source files (dependency order)")?;
    for file in &filesets.synth_files {
        let tcl_path = to_tcl_path(&file.path);
        let cmd = match file.language {
            FileLanguage::SystemVerilog => format!("read_verilog -sv {{{}}}", tcl_path),
            FileLanguage::Verilog => format!("read_verilog {{{}}}", tcl_path),
            FileLanguage::Vhdl => {
                // VHDL needs library mapping; default to 'work' library
                format!("read_vhdl -library work {{{}}}", tcl_path)
            }
            FileLanguage::Unknown => {
                // Pass through for other recognized types (e.g., .mem for memory init)
                format!("# WARNING: Unrecognized file type — skipping: {}", tcl_path)
            }
        };
        writeln!(script, "{}", cmd)?;
    }
    writeln!(script)?;

    // Preprocessor defines (if any)
    if !filesets.defines.is_empty() {
        writeln!(script, "# Preprocessor defines")?;
        let defines_str = filesets.defines.iter()
            .map(|d| format!("{{{}}}", d))
            .collect::<Vec<_>>()
            .join(" ");
        writeln!(script, "set_property verilog_define {} [current_fileset]", defines_str)?;
        writeln!(script)?;
    }

    // Read constraints
    if !filesets.constraint_files.is_empty() {
        writeln!(script, "# Read constraints (component-scoped first, then global)")?;
        for constraint in &filesets.constraint_files {
            let tcl_path = to_tcl_path(&constraint.path);
            let cmd = match &constraint.scope {
                ConstraintScope::Component { ref_name } => {
                    format!("read_xdc -ref {} {{{}}}", ref_name, tcl_path)
                }
                ConstraintScope::Global => {
                    format!("read_xdc {{{}}}", tcl_path)
                }
            };
            writeln!(script, "{}", cmd)?;
        }
        writeln!(script)?;
    }

    // Synthesis
    writeln!(script, "# Synthesis")?;
    writeln!(script, "synth_design -top {} -part {}", top_module, part)?;
    writeln!(script)?;

    // Implementation
    writeln!(script, "# Implementation")?;
    writeln!(script, "opt_design")?;
    writeln!(script, "place_design")?;
    writeln!(script, "route_design")?;
    writeln!(script)?;

    // Bitstream
    writeln!(script, "# Bitstream")?;
    writeln!(script, "write_bitstream -force {{{}}}", to_tcl_path(&bitstream_path))?;

    Ok(script)
}

/// Convert a path to Tcl-safe format.
/// Vivado Tcl: use forward slashes on all platforms.
fn to_tcl_path(path: &Path) -> String {
    path.to_string_lossy().replace('\\', "/")
}

/// Write the Tcl script to the build directory.
pub fn write_tcl_script(
    script: &str,
    context: &BuildContext,
) -> Result<PathBuf, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    std::fs::create_dir_all(&context.build_dir)?;
    let script_path = context.build_dir.join("build.tcl");
    std::fs::write(&script_path, script)?;
    Ok(script_path)
}
```

## `VivadoBackend` Struct

```rust
// crates/loom-vivado/src/lib.rs

pub mod tcl_gen;
pub mod executor;
pub mod env_check;

use std::path::PathBuf;
use loom_core::plugin::backend::{BackendPlugin, BuildResult, EnvironmentStatus, Diagnostic};
use loom_core::assemble::fileset::AssembledFilesets;
use loom_core::resolve::resolver::ResolvedProject;
use loom_core::build::context::BuildContext;
use loom_core::error::LoomError;

pub struct VivadoBackend;

impl BackendPlugin for VivadoBackend {
    fn plugin_name(&self) -> &str { "vivado" }

    fn check_environment(&self, required_version: Option<&str>) -> Result<EnvironmentStatus, LoomError> {
        env_check::check_vivado_environment(required_version)
    }

    fn validate(
        &self,
        _project: &ResolvedProject,
        _filesets: &AssembledFilesets,
        _context: &BuildContext,
    ) -> Result<Vec<Diagnostic>, LoomError> {
        // Phase 1: minimal backend-specific validation
        // Phase 2+: check IP VLNVs, Tcl syntax, etc.
        Ok(vec![])
    }

    fn generate_build_scripts(
        &self,
        project: &ResolvedProject,
        filesets: &AssembledFilesets,
        context: &BuildContext,
    ) -> Result<Vec<PathBuf>, LoomError> {
        let script = tcl_gen::generate_tcl(project, filesets, context)
            .map_err(|e| LoomError::Internal(e.to_string()))?;

        let script_path = tcl_gen::write_tcl_script(&script, context)
            .map_err(|e| LoomError::Internal(e.to_string()))?;

        Ok(vec![script_path])
    }

    fn execute_build(
        &self,
        scripts: &[PathBuf],
        context: &BuildContext,
    ) -> Result<BuildResult, LoomError> {
        executor::run_vivado_batch(scripts, context)
    }
}
```

## Tests

```rust
// In tcl_gen.rs
#[cfg(test)]
mod tests {
    use super::*;
    use loom_core::assemble::fileset::{AssembledFile, AssembledConstraint, FileLanguage, ConstraintScope};

    fn make_context() -> BuildContext {
        // Create a minimal BuildContext for testing
        todo!() // build a minimal ResolvedProject + BuildContext
    }

    #[test]
    fn test_tcl_sv_file() {
        let filesets = AssembledFilesets {
            synth_files: vec![
                AssembledFile {
                    path: PathBuf::from("/workspace/lib/axi_common/rtl/axi_pkg.sv"),
                    source_component: "org/axi_common".to_string(),
                    language: FileLanguage::SystemVerilog,
                },
            ],
            constraint_files: vec![],
            defines: vec![],
        };

        // Build a minimal resolved project and context...
        // Call generate_tcl and check the output
        // Verify: contains "read_verilog -sv {/workspace/lib/axi_common/rtl/axi_pkg.sv}"
    }

    #[test]
    fn test_tcl_component_scoped_constraint() {
        // Verify: component-scoped constraint generates "read_xdc -ref <name> {path}"
    }

    #[test]
    fn test_tcl_global_constraint() {
        // Verify: global constraint generates "read_xdc {path}"
    }

    #[test]
    fn test_tcl_path_forward_slashes() {
        // On Windows, verify backslashes in paths are converted to forward slashes
        let path = PathBuf::from(r"C:\tools\Xilinx\test.xdc");
        let tcl_path = to_tcl_path(&path);
        assert!(!tcl_path.contains('\\'));
        assert!(tcl_path.contains('/'));
    }

    #[test]
    fn test_tcl_defines() {
        // Verify: defines generate set_property verilog_define
    }

    #[test]
    fn test_full_script_structure() {
        // End-to-end: given a simple project, verify the script has
        // correct sections in correct order:
        // 1. Header comments
        // 2. read_verilog commands
        // 3. set_property verilog_define (if defines)
        // 4. read_xdc commands (component-scoped before global)
        // 5. synth_design
        // 6. opt_design / place_design / route_design
        // 7. write_bitstream
    }
}
```

## Done When

- `cargo test -p loom-vivado` passes all tests
- Generated Tcl uses forward slashes for all paths
- SystemVerilog files use `read_verilog -sv`
- VHDL files use `read_vhdl -library work`
- Component-scoped constraints use `read_xdc -ref <name>`
- Global constraints use `read_xdc`
- Script has correct section order matching spec example
- `write_tcl_script()` creates the `.build/<project>/default/build.tcl` file
